inputs.label: Enclosure Length
inputs.businessContext: The length of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.

inputs.label: Enclosure Width
inputs.businessContext: The width of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The width of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.

inputs.label: Enclosure Height
inputs.businessContext: The height of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The height of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: The room temperature outside the enclosure in degrees Celsius.

businessContext_i18n.en: The room temperature outside the enclosure in degrees Celsius.

inputs.label: Desired Basking Temperature
inputs.businessContext: The target temperature for the basking spot inside the enclosure in degrees Celsius.

businessContext_i18n.en: The target temperature for the basking spot inside the enclosure in degrees Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Muhafaza içindeki güneşlenme noktası için hedef sıcaklık (°C).

inputs.label: Insulation Factor (U-value)
inputs.businessContext: Thermal transmittance (U-value) of enclosure material. Typical glass: 5-6, insulated: 1-2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thermal transmittance (U-value) of enclosure material. Typical glass: 5-6, insulated: 1-2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Muhafaza malzemesinin ısıl geçirgenliği (U-değeri). Tipik cam: 5-6, yalıtımlı: 1-2.

formulas.requiredWattage: insulationFactor * ((2 * (enclosureLength * enclosureWidth + enclosureLength * enclosureHeight + enclosureWidth * enclosureHeight)) / 10000) * (desiredTemp - ambientTemp)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
